entries.reason: parent_email enforcement for is_minor is handled in ClientRegistrationForm.clean(), not at model level. Model-level EmailField format validation is sufficient per Django patterns.

ClassSession.is_upcoming() and is_past() are state methods based on model's own fields. Valid Fat Model pattern per RFC-BACKEND-001. Business flow logic belongs in services, state logic belongs in models.
Same as DL-20260325-001. RNF-004 violation on is_upcoming/is_past is the same false positive — state methods are maintainable by design.
EmailField without explicit blank=False is valid Django — EmailField default behavior enforces blank=False at form level. No explicit declaration needed per Django docs.
hourly_rate is intentionally null=True, blank=True — tutors may register without setting a rate for MVP. This is accepted debt to be resolved post-MVP when rate becomes mandatory.
